title: Digital Government Strategy 2022
summary: Recommends that Bahraini government entities use emerging technologies with positive public impact, including artificial intelligence, blockchain, robotics, internet of things, data analytics, and smart-service applications.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Strategy directing government entities to explore emerging technologies.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Digital government strategy supporting government use of IoT and emerging technologies.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Government strategy encouraging use of emerging technologies including blockchain.
theme_notes.digital_government.egovernment_services: National strategy for Bahrain digital government transformation.

notes: Related instruments: General Policy for the Use of Artificial Intelligence and National Digital Economy Strategy
